seo.title: Top 10 Things to Do in Jakarta, Indonesia
seo.description: Discover 10 must-see landmarks in Jakarta, Indonesia. Free GPS routes, photos, and history.
seo.intro: Planning a trip to Jakarta? Explore the best places to visit in Jakarta, Indonesia.
keywords: best places to visit in Jakarta

places.name: Monas
places.description: Indonesia's towering National Monument crowns Merdeka Square and offers elevator views over the capital's sprawl.
places.seo_phrase: Monas Jakarta | National Monument & Merdeka Square Guide

places.name: Istiqlal Mosque
places.description: Southeast Asia's largest mosque stands opposite Jakarta Cathedral, symbolizing the nation's religious harmony.
places.seo_phrase: Istiqlal Mosque Jakarta | Southeast Asia's Grandest Mosque

places.name: Jakarta Cathedral
places.description: This neo-Gothic Roman Catholic cathedral, rebuilt after fire, anchors the historic heart of colonial Batavia.
places.seo_phrase: Jakarta Cathedral | Neo-Gothic Church at Lapangan Banteng

places.name: Kota Tua
places.description: Kota Tua preserves Dutch-era warehouses and canals where Jakarta's trading past still feels alive on foot.
places.seo_phrase: Kota Tua Jakarta | Old Town Dutch Heritage Walk

places.name: Fatahillah Square
places.description: Fatahillah Square is the lively plaza fronting the Jakarta History Museum with street performers and vintage bikes.
places.seo_phrase: Fatahillah Square | Jakarta History Museum Plaza

places.name: National Museum of Indonesia
places.description: Known as the Elephant Building, this museum holds one of the finest collections of Indonesian archaeology and ethnography.
places.seo_phrase: National Museum of Indonesia | Elephant Building Collections

places.name: Sunda Kelapa Harbor
places.description: Pinisi schooners still load cargo at Sunda Kelapa, Jakarta's centuries-old port on the Ciliwung River mouth.
places.seo_phrase: Sunda Kelapa Harbor | Historic Pinisi Port Jakarta

places.name: Taman Mini Indonesia Indah
places.description: TMII showcases traditional houses from every province in a vast cultural park with museums and lake rides.
places.seo_phrase: Taman Mini Indonesia Indah | Cultural Park East Jakarta

places.name: Senayan Park
places.description: Senayan Park and the Gelora Bung Karno complex offer green space, sports venues, and events beside central Jakarta.
places.seo_phrase: Senayan Park Jakarta | GBK Sports & Green Space

places.name: Glodok Chinatown
places.description: Glodok is Jakarta's bustling Chinatown of temples, markets, and street food alleys northwest of Kota Tua.
places.seo_phrase: Glodok Chinatown Jakarta | Markets & Temples Guide

seo.title: Top 10 Things to Do in Yogyakarta, Indonesia
seo.description: Discover 10 must-see landmarks in Yogyakarta, Indonesia. Free GPS routes, photos, and history.
seo.intro: Planning a trip to Yogyakarta? Explore the best places to visit in Yogyakarta, Indonesia.
keywords: best places to visit in Yogyakarta

places.name: Kraton Ngayogyakarta Hadiningrat
places.description: The Sultan's palace remains a living court of Javanese culture with pavilions, gamelan, and royal heirlooms.
places.seo_phrase: Yogyakarta Kraton | Sultan's Palace & Javanese Court

places.name: Taman Sari
places.description: The Water Castle blends bathing pools, underground passages, and gardens built for the royal family.
places.seo_phrase: Taman Sari Water Castle | Royal Pools Yogyakarta

places.name: Malioboro Street
places.description: Malioboro is Yogyakarta's main boulevard for batik shops, becak rides, and nightly street food.
places.seo_phrase: Malioboro Street | Yogyakarta Shopping & Street Life

places.name: Beringharjo Market
places.description: Beringharjo Market is the city's oldest bazaar for batik, spices, and everyday Javanese goods.
places.seo_phrase: Beringharjo Market | Historic Batik Bazaar Yogyakarta

places.name: Museum Sonobudoyo
places.description: Sonobudoyo displays Javanese wayang, keris, and ethnographic treasures steps from the northern alun-alun.
places.seo_phrase: Museum Sonobudoyo | Javanese Art & Wayang Yogyakarta

places.name: Sultan's Carriage Museum
places.description: Museum Kereta houses ornate royal carriages and ceremonial transport from the Yogyakarta sultanate.
places.seo_phrase: Sultan's Carriage Museum | Royal Kereta Collection

places.name: Kotagede
places.description: Kotagede's silver workshops and mosque quarter preserve the legacy of the Mataram kingdom's first capital.
places.seo_phrase: Kotagede Yogyakarta | Silver Village & Old Mataram

places.name: Alun-Alun Kidul
places.description: The southern royal square is famous for twin banyan trees and a playful blindfolded walk tradition.
places.seo_phrase: Alun-Alun Kidul | Southern Royal Square Yogyakarta

places.name: Ngasem Market
places.description: Ngasem bird market near the kraton is a colorful slice of local life with songbirds and handicrafts.
places.seo_phrase: Ngasem Market Yogyakarta | Bird Market Near Kraton

places.name: Gembira Loka Zoo
places.description: Gembira Loka Zoo pairs Indonesian wildlife exhibits with family-friendly gardens in east Yogyakarta.
places.seo_phrase: Gembira Loka Zoo | Family Wildlife Park Yogyakarta

seo.title: Top 10 Things to Do in Ubud, Indonesia
seo.description: Discover 10 must-see landmarks in Ubud, Indonesia. Free GPS routes, photos, and history.
seo.intro: Planning a trip to Ubud? Explore the best places to visit in Ubud, Indonesia.
keywords: best places to visit in Ubud

places.name: Sacred Monkey Forest Sanctuary
places.description: Lush forest temples shelter hundreds of long-tailed macaques amid mossy statues and jungle paths.
places.seo_phrase: Ubud Monkey Forest | Sacred Sanctuary & Temples

places.name: Ubud Palace
places.description: Puri Saren Agung hosts evening dance performances in the heart of Ubud's royal quarter.
places.seo_phrase: Ubud Palace | Puri Saren Agung & Balinese Dance

places.name: Ubud Art Market
places.description: Morning stalls overflow with batik, wood carvings, and souvenirs steps from the palace gates.
places.seo_phrase: Ubud Art Market | Batik & Handicrafts Shopping

places.name: Pura Taman Saraswati
places.description: This water temple honors the goddess of learning with a lotus pond and carved gates on Jalan Raya Ubud.
places.seo_phrase: Pura Taman Saraswati | Lotus Temple Ubud

places.name: Campuhan Ridge Walk
places.description: An easy ridge trail above the Ayung River valley delivers classic Ubud rice-field panoramas at sunrise.
places.seo_phrase: Campuhan Ridge Walk | Ubud Sunrise Trail Guide

places.name: Blanco Renaissance Museum
places.description: The flamboyant former studio of Antonio Blanco showcases his portraits amid hilltop gardens.
places.seo_phrase: Blanco Renaissance Museum | Antonio Blanco Art Ubud

places.name: ARMA Museum
places.description: ARMA pairs classical and contemporary Balinese art with cultural workshops in a tranquil compound.
places.seo_phrase: ARMA Museum Ubud | Balinese Art & Culture

places.name: Neka Art Museum
places.description: Neka surveys Balinese painting schools from wayang styles to modern masters in curated galleries.
places.seo_phrase: Neka Art Museum | Balinese Painting Collections Ubud

places.name: The Yoga Barn
places.description: The Yoga Barn is Ubud's renowned wellness campus for daily classes, retreats, and plant-based dining.
places.seo_phrase: The Yoga Barn Ubud | Yoga Retreats & Wellness

places.name: Pura Dalem Agung
places.description: The main death temple of Padangtegal anchors the monkey forest with towering meru shrines.
places.seo_phrase: Pura Dalem Agung | Padangtegal Temple Ubud

seo.title: Top 10 Things to Do in Bandung, Indonesia

places.name: Jalan Braga
places.description: Braga Street blends art deco facades, cafes, and galleries in Bandung's most walkable heritage lane.

places.name: Alun-alun Bandung
places.description: The city square faces the grand mosque and is a gathering place for evening snacks and family outings.

places.name: Great Mosque of Bandung
places.description: Masjid Raya Bandung's soaring minarets dominate the skyline beside the central alun-alun.
places.seo_phrase: Great Mosque of Bandung | Masjid Raya Landmark

places.name: Museum Geologi
places.description: Indonesia's geology museum explains volcanoes and fossils that shape the surrounding highlands.
places.seo_phrase: Museum Geologi Bandung | Volcanoes & Fossils

places.name: Kampung Daun
places.description: Kampung Daun serves Sundanese cuisine in bamboo villages with waterfalls on Bandung's green outskirts.

places.name: Saung Angklung Udjo
places.description: This cultural center stages interactive angklung bamboo orchestra performances for visitors.
places.seo_phrase: Saung Angklung Udjo | Bamboo Orchestra Bandung

places.name: Paris Van Java
places.description: Paris Van Java mall mixes upscale shopping with open-air architecture in Bandung's northern hills.

places.name: Jalan Riau
places.description: Jalan Riau and adjacent factory outlets are Bandung's go-to strip for fashion and local factory sales.
places.seo_phrase: Jalan Riau Bandung | Factory Outlet Shopping

places.name: House of Sampoerna

places.description: Bungkul Park is a beloved urban green space for skateboarding, street food, and evening hangouts.

best places to visit in Labuan Bajo

adventure.title: Indonesia Islands & Volcanoes Road Trip
adventure.subtitle: Explore Indonesia beyond the cities — rainforests, dragons, reefs, and volcanic calderas.
